de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Interface IPersistablePO

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ProofOblInput
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractInfFlowPO, AbstractOperationPO, AbstractPO, BlockExecutionPO, DependencyContractPO, FunctionalOperationContractPO, InfFlowContractPO, LoopInvExecutionPO, ProgramMethodPO, ProgramMethodSubsetPO, SymbolicExecutionPO, TacletProofObligationInput, WellDefinednessPO

    public interface IPersistablePO
extends ProofOblInput

    This interface extends the standard proof obligation (ProofOblInput) with functionality to define the individual parameters which are required for loading and saving *.proof files.

    During save process the ProofSaver calls method fillSaveProperties(Properties). This proof obligation has to store all information in the given Properties which are required to reconstruct it. The class (#getClass()) of this class must be stored in the Properties with key PROPERTY_CLASS.

    During load process the ProblemLoader tries to execute a static method on the class defined via Properties key PROPERTY_CLASS with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException The returned IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer contains the instantiated ProofOblInput together with the proof index.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    ProofSaver, ProblemLoader

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static class  IPersistablePO.LoadedPOContainer
      The class stored in a Properties instance via key must provide the static method with the following signature: public static LoadedPOContainer loadFrom(InitConfig initConfig, Properties properties) throws IOException This method is called by the ProblemLoader to recreate a proof obligation.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static String PROPERTY_ADD_SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION_LABEL
      The key used to store AbstractOperationPO.isAddSymbolicExecutionLabel().
      static String PROPERTY_ADD_UNINTERPRETED_PREDICATE
      The key used to store AbstractOperationPO.isAddUninterpretedPredicate().
      static String PROPERTY_CLASS
      The key used to store #getClass().
      static String PROPERTY_FILENAME
      The key used to store the file name under which a PO is loaded.
      static String PROPERTY_NAME
      The key used to store ProofOblInput.name().

      void fillSaveProperties(Properties properties)

    • Field Detail

      • PROPERTY_CLASS

        static final String PROPERTY_CLASS
        The key used to store #getClass().

      • PROPERTY_NAME

        static final String PROPERTY_NAME
        The key used to store ProofOblInput.name().
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PROPERTY_FILENAME

        static final String PROPERTY_FILENAME
        The key used to store the file name under which a PO is loaded. This key is set during loading by the loader and needs not be saved.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PROPERTY_ADD_SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION_LABEL

        static final String PROPERTY_ADD_SYMBOLIC_EXECUTION_LABEL
        The key used to store AbstractOperationPO.isAddSymbolicExecutionLabel().
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PROPERTY_ADD_UNINTERPRETED_PREDICATE

        static final String PROPERTY_ADD_UNINTERPRETED_PREDICATE
        The key used to store AbstractOperationPO.isAddUninterpretedPredicate().
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Method Detail

      • fillSaveProperties

        void fillSaveProperties(Properties properties)
                 throws IOException
        This method is called by a ProofSaver to store the proof specific settings in the given Properties. The stored settings have to contain all information required to instantiate the proof obligation again and this instance should create the same Sequent (if code and specifications are unchanged).
        Parameters:
        properties - The Properties to fill with the proof obligation specific settings.
        Throws:
        IOException - Occurred Exception.
